overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban park at night in Cyberpunk 2077. The player approaches the Rancho Coronado Public Park entrance, walks past neon signage and palm trees, continues along a path with benches where NPCs are sitting, and approaches a large pink neon-lit dome structure. The scene features heavy neon lighting with teal and pink hues against a dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban park entrance plaza with neon signage

events.description: passing the illuminated Rancho Coronado Public Park entrance sign into the park proper

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the park entrance along the paved walkway

notable_agents.action: woman in a dress walking past the camera from right to left

entered.detail: large illuminated concrete sign with 'RANCHO CORONADO PUBLIC PARK' in bright green neon text
tall dark skyscraper with illuminated white '07' signage near the top
tall palm trees lining the entrance pathway
tall vertical digital billboard displaying pink and white neon floral patterns
tall modern street lamps illuminating the entrance area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to Rancho Coronado Public Park in a futuristic city at night. The camera approaches the illuminated park sign while neon billboards and the distant '07' building dominate the skyline. A pedestrian walks past on the right as the camera moves forward along the paved entrance plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: park pathway with seating areas and large advertisement displays

events.description: passing by NPCs sitting on park benches to the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path through the park interior, passing seated individuals

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on a concrete bench, one appears to be reading

entered.detail: concrete park benches with people sitting, surrounded by scattered papers
large vertical billboard displaying a male figure in dark clothing with yellow text
large spherical dome structure with intricate metal framework and bright magenta pink neon lighting visible inside

segments.scene_description: Having entered the park, the camera moves along a dirt trail lined with palm trees. To the right, NPCs sit on concrete benches surrounded by litter, while a large vertical advertisement billboard rises on the left. In the distance, a massive pink neon-lit dome structure becomes visible through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open park area approaching the large neon-lit dome structure

events.description: approaching closer to the pink neon dome which becomes the dominant visual element in the frame

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large pink neon dome structure, passing through an open grassy area

entered.detail: derelict blue car parked on the grass to the right of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the massive pink neon dome structure that dominates the park's interior. The camera passes an abandoned vehicle on the right while moving through an open area with scattered debris. The dome's intricate metal framework and intense pink glow become the central focus as the camera draws nearer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bustling urban entrance of Rancho Coronado Public Park into its neon-drenched interior. It begins at the paved entrance plaza, moving past an illuminated park sign and a passing pedestrian while neon billboards and the distant 07 building loom over the skyline. As the camera enters the park, the pavement shifts to a dirt trail lined with palm trees and concrete benches where NPCs sit amidst scattered litter. The scene then opens up as the camera passes an abandoned vehicle and debris, drawing closer to a massive pink neon-lit dome. Finally, the intricate metal framework and intense pink glow of the dome dominate the view as the camera reaches the heart of the park.
